body.title: Sweep dead/orphan functions in lab/claudecode/ scripts
body.result: Shipped in 7eab3704. -440 LOC: slate_manager.py deleted (429 lines orphan; only grep hits in chat_logs), cmd_inject + COMMANDS entry removed (xdotool path superseded by worker daemon), export_chat.py OUTPUT_DIR now CLAUDE_CHAT_LOGS_DIR env var with ~/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs default. Kept verified-live: set-worker, needs-review. Import smoke + test_worker_foreman (16 tests) pass.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 8 Finding 11B-11 (disposal: SHIP). Targeted dead-code cleanup in lab/claudecode/. Verified consumers:
- slate_manager.py (429 lines): orphan — only grep hits are historical chat_logs. Skills write slate via bash heredocs inline.
- cmd_inject in cc_queue.py: deprecated; xdotool injection replaced by worker daemon. Only grep hits in chat_logs. Remove function + COMMANDS entry.
- export_chat.py: OUTPUT_DIR hardcoded to /home/akien/TheIgors/claude_chat_logs. Parameterize via env var with same default.

Keep (verified live): set-worker (test_worker_foreman), needs-review (seed_work_ticket_habits.py). decision_manager.py:75 path is correct post-D328 reorg — no fix needed.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/slate_manager.py (delete), lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (remove cmd_inject), lab/claudecode/export_chat.py (env var + default).
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: dead-code removal + env-var plumbing; import-check clean is the verification).
**Scope boundary:** IN — the three cleanups above. OUT — other dead-code audits; parameterizing skills; consolidating manager scripts (separate 11B-1 ticket).
**Test plan:** no new tests — existing pytest suite must stay green after removals. import check: python3 -c 'import lab.claudecode.cc_queue; import lab.claudecode.export_chat'
